import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import Loader from 'react-loaders' import AnimatedLetters from '../AnimatedLetters' import LogoTitle from '../../assets/images/logo-s.png' import LogoS from '../../assets/images/logo-s.png' import './index.scss' const Home = () => { const [letterClass, setLetterClass] = useState('text-animate') const nameArray = ['e', 'p', 't', 'i', ' ', 'R', 'i', 'z', 'k', 'y'] const jobArray = [ 'W', 'e', 'b', ' ', 'D', 'e', 'v', 'e', 'l', 'o', 'p', 'e', 'r', '.', ] useEffect(() => { return setTimeout(() => { setLetterClass('text-animate-hover') }, 4000) }, []) return ( <>

H i,
I 'm

Fullstack Developer / Frontend Developer / Backend Developer

CONTACT ME
) } export default Home
